artPrompt: A translucent spirit volunteer drifts upward through the wide frame, headset ghosting at its ear, a coiled phone cord trailing into a wash that dissolves into golden light. Its lower body fades to vapor over a sketched folding table and clipboard, brush line confident at the face, bleeding to nothing below. A gentle, persistent haunting of civic duty, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Phone Bank Phantom
text:
Flying
Whenever Phone Bank Phantom deals combat damage to a player, you may have that player draw a card. If you do, create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (You called them. They picked up. Now they're involved.)
flavorText: "Hi, do you have a moment to talk about the recall?" The line went dead. But the Voter rolls did not.
